title: The Reason for Abu Harb al-Mubarga"s Rebellion and Its Eventual Outcome
description: The Reason for Abu Harb al-Mubarga"s Rebellion and Its Eventual Outcome. Recorded under the year 226 AH (841–842 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 33.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 33
